requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer / Agent and Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian Language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 本地授权进口商/代理商与波斯尼亚/克罗地亚/塞尔维亚语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 本地授權進口商/代理商與波斯尼亞/克羅地亞/塞爾維亞語標注

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers placing radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment on the Bosnia and Herzegovina market must appoint a locally authorised importer or representative established in BiH. The authorised importer is responsible for ensuring the product holds a valid RAK type approval certificate and an ATK conformity certificate, and that product labelling and user documentation are in Bosnian, Croatian, and/or Serbian — the three official languages of BiH (Bosnian and Croatian use Latin script; Serbian may use both Latin and Cyrillic). Product labels must include the importer's name, address, and contact information. User manuals and safety instructions must be available in official BiH languages. BiH's complex entity governance (Republika Srpska, Federation of BiH, and Brčko District) may require attention to entity-specific labelling or packaging requirements. CE, CCC, and FCC marks alone do not satisfy BiH market access requirements. Significant Chinese commercial presence in BiH (infrastructure investment) does not exempt products from regulatory compliance.
summary.zh: 将无线电设备和电信终端设备投放波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那市场的境外制造商，须在波黑指定一名当地授权进口商或代表。授权进口商负责确保产品持有有效的RAK型式核准证书和ATK符合性证书，并保证产品标签和用户文件使用波斯尼亚语、克罗地亚语和/或塞尔维亚语——波黑三种官方语言（波斯尼亚语和克罗地亚语使用拉丁字母；塞尔维亚语可使用拉丁字母或西里尔字母）。产品标签须包含进口商的名称、地址和联系方式。用户手册和安全说明须提供波黑官方语言版本。波黑复杂的实体治理架构（塞族共和国、波黑联邦及布尔奇科区）可能需要关注实体特定的标注或包装要求。CE、CCC和FCC标志单独均不满足波黑市场准入要求。中国在波黑的大量商业存在（基础设施投资）不免除产品的监管合规义务。
summary.zht: 將無線電設備和電信終端設備投放波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納市場的境外製造商，須在波黑指定一名當地授權進口商或代表。授權進口商負責確保產品持有有效的RAK型式核准證書和ATK符合性證書，並保證產品標籤和用戶文件使用波斯尼亞語、克羅地亞語和/或塞爾維亞語——波黑三種官方語言（波斯尼亞語和克羅地亞語使用拉丁字母；塞爾維亞語可使用拉丁字母或西里尔字母）。產品標籤須包含進口商的名稱、地址和聯繫方式。用戶手冊和安全說明須提供波黑官方語言版本。波黑複雜的實體治理架構（塞族共和國、波黑聯邦及布爾奇科區）可能需要關注實體特定的標注或包裝要求。CE、CCC和FCC標誌單獨均不滿足波黑市場准入要求。中國在波黑的大量商業存在（基礎設施投資）不免除產品的監管合規義務。

standards_or_laws: Law on Communications of Bosnia and Herzegovina (Zakon o komunikacijama) — importer obligations for radio equipment
RAK type approval conditions — authorised importer / representative requirement
ATK conformity certification requirements — importer responsibility for product safety
Law on Consumer Protection of Bosnia and Herzegovina — official language labelling obligation (Bosnian, Croatian, Serbian)
Law on General Product Safety of Bosnia and Herzegovina — market surveillance and importer responsibilities

summary.en: China does not require a locally-established importer for foreign wireless devices in the same way; instead, MIIT type approval (SRRC / NAL) is obtained by the manufacturer or their agent directly. Chinese-market product labelling is in Chinese (Mandarin) and must comply with GB standards for labelling content. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to the BiH authorised importer obligation or trilingual labelling requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对境外无线设备不以同样方式要求在华设立本地进口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由制造商或其代理直接申请。中国市场产品标注使用中文（普通话），须符合GB标准的标注内容要求。波黑授权进口商义务或三语标注要求在中国无直接对应项。
summary.zht: 中國對境外無線設備不以同樣方式要求在華設立本地進口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由製造商或其代理直接申請。中國市場產品標注使用中文（普通話），須符合GB標準的標注內容要求。波黑授權進口商義務或三語標注要求在中國無直接對應項。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — applicant may be manufacturer or authorised agent (no mandatory local importer entity required)
GB 5296.1-2012 — Instructions for use of consumer products (Chinese language labelling)
GB 7247 / GB 10408 product label content requirements

gap.en: China has no equivalent local-importer mandate for the BiH market. Manufacturers must establish or contract a legally-registered BiH entity to act as authorised importer/representative before RAK type approval and ATK conformity certificate can be activated for market placement. All product labelling and user documentation must be translated into Bosnian, Croatian, and/or Serbian (the three official languages). BiH entity governance (Republika Srpska, Federation of BiH, Brčko District) may add further labelling or registration obligations at the entity level. This is an additional compliance step with no analogue in the SRRC/NAL process.
gap.zh: 中国针对波黑市场没有等效的本地进口商强制要求。制造商须在RAK型式核准和ATK符合性证书可用于市场投放前，建立或签约一家在波黑合法注册的实体作为授权进口商/代表。所有产品标签和用户文件须翻译成波斯尼亚语、克罗地亚语和/或塞尔维亚语（三种官方语言）。波黑实体治理架构（塞族共和国、波黑联邦、布尔奇科区）可能在实体层面增加额外的标注或注册义务。这是SRRC/NAL流程中没有对应项的额外合规步骤。
gap.zht: 中國針對波黑市場沒有等效的本地進口商強制要求。製造商須在RAK型式核准和ATK符合性證書可用於市場投放前，建立或簽約一家在波黑合法註冊的實體作為授權進口商/代表。所有產品標籤和用戶文件須翻譯成波斯尼亞語、克羅地亞語和/或塞爾維亞語（三種官方語言）。波黑實體治理架構（塞族共和國、波黑聯邦、布爾奇科區）可能在實體層面增加額外的標注或注冊義務。這是SRRC/NAL流程中沒有對應項的額外合規步驟。

source.publisher: RAK — Regulatory Agency for Communications of Bosnia and Herzegovina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Appointment of a locally-registered BiH authorised importer or representative, Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian language labelling of product and user documentation, and dual RAK/ATK certification are mandatory for market access in Bosnia and Herzegovina. There is no Chinese-side equivalent. Entity-level governance complexity (Republika Srpska / Federation of BiH / Brčko District) may require additional local legal advice. Verify specific importer registration and labelling obligations with a qualified BiH legal or regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 指定在波黑注册的授权进口商或代表、产品和用户文件的波斯尼亚/克罗地亚/塞尔维亚语标注，以及RAK/ATK双重认证，是进入波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那市场的强制要求。中国方面无等效项。实体层级治理复杂性（塞族共和国/波黑联邦/布尔奇科区）可能需要额外的本地法律建议。请向合格的波黑法律或监管专业人士核实具体的进口商注册和标注义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 指定在波黑注冊的授權進口商或代表、產品和用戶文件的波斯尼亞/克羅地亞/塞爾維亞語標注，以及RAK/ATK雙重認證，是進入波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納市場的強制要求。中國方面無等效項。實體層級治理複雜性（塞族共和國/波黑聯邦/布爾奇科區）可能需要額外的本地法律建議。請向合格的波黑法律或監管專業人士核實具體的進口商注冊和標注義務。
